title: 'aguddah #0092
definition:
1) band, binding
    1a) cords, bands, thongs (metaphorical of slavery)
    1b) bunch of hyssop
    1c) band of men, troops
    1d) vault (of the heavens), firmament (binding earth to the
        heavens)
